How to Earn a Role in the Vault

Earn a special role in the Vault to list your name on this page.

Atomic Sponsor

  • Make a donation <3
  • Add your name, image, and link(s) on this home page of pip-boy.com
Sponsor this website

Vault-Tec Engineer

  • Contribute a game or app for the Pip-Boy 3000 Mk V or 3000a device
  • And/or contribute to the pip-boy.com website (repo)
  • Add your name and link(s) on this home page of pip-boy.com
Contribute to the website Design an app or game

Vault-Tec Security & Support

  • The moderators & supporting members in the Pip-Boy.com community
  • Message “Vault-Tec Support” in Discord if you’d like to take on these roles
  • Add your name and link(s) on this home page of pip-boy.com
Join Discord & Help the Community

Discord Server Booster

  • Boost the community Discord Server
  • Add your name and link(s) on this home page of pip-boy.com
Boost the Community Discord Server

Special role holders receive automatic access to #vault-tec-crew
